inputPlaceholder: Paste or type your data here, or drop a file
binaryRejected: Binary file detected, please upload a text file

descriptions.whatIsP1: CSV (Comma-Separated Values) is a plain text format for storing tabular data. Each line represents a row, and fields are separated by commas. It's the most common format for data exchange between spreadsheets, databases, and applications.
descriptions.whatIsP2: This tool converts between JSON, CSV, and Markdown Table formats in real-time. All processing happens in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.
descriptions.howP1: Select your input format and output format using the buttons above each panel. Paste, type, or drag-and-drop your data into the input panel. The output updates automatically.
descriptions.howP2: Nested JSON objects are flattened using dot-notation (e.g., user.name). Arrays of objects produce numbered keys (e.g., items.0). Single JSON objects are auto-wrapped into arrays.
descriptions.supportedP1: JSON → CSV, JSON → Markdown Table, CSV → JSON, CSV → Markdown Table, Markdown Table → JSON, Markdown Table → CSV. Auto-detects CSV delimiters (comma, tab, semicolon, pipe).
descriptions.limitationsP1: Files larger than 5MB are rejected. Binary files are detected and rejected. Excel (.xlsx) format is not supported.
